name: Baquette Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Olive oil; or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl and mix together, holding back some of the flour until needed.
2. Knead dough for 5-10 minutes or until it is smooth.
3. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
4. Punch down the dough and form into desired shapes (baquettes, round loaves, etc.).
5. Bake at 375°F for 20-30 minutes, depending on loaf size.
6. For more flavorful breads, add fresh chopped herbs and some roasted garlic to the dough.
